title: Iresine verschaffeltii
taxonomy: Iresine verschaffeltii is classified within the family Amaranthaceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant in the genus Iresine. It is native to the tropical regions of South America. Iresine verschaffeltii belongs to the order Caryophyllales, which comprises various flowering plant families. The species is also sometimes referred to as a member of the subfamily Gomphrenoideae.

side_effects: Iresine verschaffeltii is a tropical plant that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions in some individuals due to its sap or leaves.
